x-enumeration-literals.name: Principal-Only Rollover
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Only the original principal is rolled over; accrued interest is paid out separately.

Comment:
Example:

Term Deposit: €10,000 principal + €500 interest matures.

Rollover: €10,000 principal rolled into a new 12-month term; €500 interest paid to the customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Compound Rollover
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Compound Rollover (Principal plus Interest Rollover) Both principal and accrued interest are rolled over together, creating a compounded amount.

Comment:
Example:

Term Deposit: €10,000 principal + €500 interest matures.

Rollover: €10,500 (principal + interest) becomes the new deposit, earning interest in the new term.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partial Rollover
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Only a portion of the matured amount is rolled over; the rest is withdrawn or used differently.

Comment:
Example:

Term Deposit: €10,000 principal + €500 interest matures.

Rollover: €5,000 rolled over; €5,500 paid out to the customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjusted Balance Rollover
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The rollover amount is adjusted for fees, taxes, or charges before being renewed.

Comment:
Example:

Term Deposit: €10,000 principal + €500 interest matures.

Bank deducts €50 tax or fees → €10,450 is rolled over for the next term.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repriced Rollover
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The rollover occurs at a revised interest rate, which may differ from the original.

Comment:
Example:

Term Deposit: €10,000 principal at 3% interest matures.

Rollover: Principal €10,000 renewed for 12 months at a new rate of 3.25%.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Rollover
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The rollover occurs only if certain conditions are met, such as minimum balance, customer consent, or regulatory requirements.

Comment:
Example:

Business Loan: €50,000 matures.

Rollover occurs only if the borrower has maintained a minimum account balance of €10,000.
